dashboard.title: Real-time Camera Monitoring
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your face recognition system in real-time
dashboard.error: Cannot load camera stream. Please make sure the backend server is running.

info.title: System Information
info.description: If the real-time camera feed is not displayed, make sure the backend server is running.

faceList.title: Registered Faces
faceList.subtitle: {{count}} faces registered
faceList.noFacesDescription: There are no registered faces yet.
faceList.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the face '{{name}}'?
faceList.confirmMerge: Do you want to merge all faces with the name '{{name}}' into one?
faceList.selectImage: Select an image to add a sample for '{{name}}'

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.subtitle: Check automatic attendance status via face recognition

stats.noData: No attendance data for this period

liveness.title: Liveness Check Attendance
liveness.subtitle: Real-time identity verification to prevent photo-based fraud

messages.ready: Press the button below to start identity verification
messages.cameraError: Cannot access camera. Please check permissions.
messages.sessionError: Failed to create session. Please try again.
messages.turnHead: Turn your head toward the red dot (A)
messages.turnMore: Turn your head a little more
messages.challengePassed: Passed! Now turn toward the next direction
messages.noFace: No face detected. Please check the camera.
messages.faceChanged: A different person was detected during the session. Please try again.
messages.unnaturalMotion: Unnatural movement detected. Please try again with your real face.
messages.tooManyRetries: Too many attempts. Please try again in 10 minutes.

guide.title: Verification Steps
guide.step1Desc: Position your face in front of the camera
guide.step2Desc: Turn your head toward the red dot (A)
guide.step3Desc: Turn your head toward the next dot
guide.step4Desc: Attendance is automatically recorded after 2 passes

info.title: Tips
info.tip1: Position your face within the oval guide
info.tip2: Slowly turn your head toward the red dot
